author: EmanueleCoradin
body:
## PR Description

This PR adds the trained model for the Pixel Track Selection task within the CMS Phase-2 HLT, under development within the NGT project. 

For reference, a presentation can be found [here](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1680142/#92-update-on-pixel-track-dnn-a)
title: Add PixelTrackTorchHighPuritySelector classifier
